name: Sitemorse
description: Sitemorse — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: Sitemorse — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: Sitemorse: Sitemorse — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: Scheduled accessibility and quality scan for government website
Automated PDF accessibility check for public document library
Policy compliance audit trail exported for regulatory submission
Broken link detection combined with WCAG monitoring in one tool
Cross-team accessibility reporting dashboard for large intranet

pros: Long-standing site quality and a11y monitoring vendor
Benchmarks across government and enterprise sectors
Detailed reports covering WCAG, links and SEO
cons: UI and scoring model feel legacy
review.verdict: Old-guard a11y and site quality vendor favored in public sector, less compelling for modern dev teams.
review.best_for: Public sector and enterprise teams needing benchmarked compliance reports.
review.not_for: Developer teams wanting modern APIs and CI integration.
